productDisplayName: Arrow Men Solid Navy Blue Slim Fit Shirt
description: CompositionNavy blue shirt in a jacquard weave, made of 100% superfine cotton, has a spread collar, a buttoned front placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, fine stitches - SPI 16 on the shoulders, patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hemFitSlimWash careMachine wash separately in cold water in a gentle cycle inside out, using a high quality detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry lowLine dry inside out in shadeWarm steam iron do not iron on decorationsThis navy blue shirt from arrow's Premium Collection is crafted from soft cotton fabric in a jacquard weave, and has a contemporary slim fit that offers a flattering formal silhouette, making for an easy addition to your wardrobe. Team it with crisp formal pants and a blazer and add on leather shoes and classy accessories for that perfect formal look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'11& rdquo and shoulders 17.5"
